post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password. No x-role header required. Returns user info (without password) on success. Store the returned object in localStorage as the active session.

200.description: Login successful. Returns user record (without password).

post.description: Registers a new user account without requiring any authorization headers. Intended for the public sign-up page.

Creates a new user account in the system. Only the System Administrator can register new users by providing name, email, password, role, and optional phone/specialization fields. Send a POST request with a CreateUserDto JSON body containing all required user fields.

post.description: Submits a new wastage report. Any authenticated user (including Campus Visitor) can report wastage. Send a POST with a CreateWastageReportDto JSON body.

get.description: Retrieves all wastage reports. Any authenticated user can view them (the frontend filters by reporter).

200.description: Array of wastage report records returned.

get.description: Retrieves a single wastage report by UUID. Any authenticated user can look up reports.

put.description: Completely replaces an existing wastage report. Only the System Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates a wastage report (e.g., status). The Sustainability Officer and System Administrator can update reports.

delete.description: Permanently removes a wastage report. Only the System Administrator can delete.

post.description: Creates a new alert triggered by a meter anomaly. The System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can raise alerts.

get.description: Retrieves all alert records. The System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can view alerts and their statuses.
Retrieves a single alert by UUID including messages chat thread. The System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can look up alerts.

put.description: Completely replaces an existing alert record. Only the System Administrator and Technician Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates an alert (e.g., status from open to acknowledged/resolved). System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes an alert record. Only the System Administrator and Technician Administrator can delete alerts.

post.description: Appends a message to the alert JSONB messages thread. System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can post messages.

get.description: Retrieves all fault records linked to a specific alert. System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can view faults from an alert.

post.description: Logs a new equipment fault, optionally linked to an alert. System Administrator and Technician can create faults.

get.description: Retrieves all fault records. System Administrator and Technician can view faults.
Retrieves a single fault by UUID. System Administrator and Technician can look up faults.

put.description: Completely replaces an existing fault record. Only System Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates a fault (e.g., status, reassigning Technician). System Administrator and Technician can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes a fault record. Only the System Administrator can delete faults.

get.description: Retrieves all work orders linked to a fault. System Administrator and Technician can view.

200.description: Array of work order records returned.

post.description: Submits a new service request. Any authenticated user (including Campus Visitor) can create service requests.

get.description: Retrieves all service requests.

200.description: Array of service request records returned.

get.description: Retrieves a single service request by UUID.

put.description: Completely replaces a service request. Only System Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates a service request.

delete.description: Permanently removes a service request. Only System Administrator can delete.

get.summary: Get Work Orders for Service Request
get.description: Retrieves all work orders from a service request. System Administrator and Technician can view.

200.description: Array of work order records returned.

post.description: Creates a new work order linked to a fault or service request. System Administrator, Technician Administrator and Technician can create work orders.

get.description: Retrieves all work orders.

200.description: Array of work order records returned.

get.description: Retrieves a single work order by UUID.

put.description: Completely replaces a work order record. System Administrator and Technician Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates a work order (e.g., status, priority). System Administrator, Technician Administrator, Technician, and Financial Analyst can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes a work order. System Administrator and Technician Administrator can delete.

post.description: Records a new energy cost entry for a building/department for a given period. Financial Analyst and System Administrator can create.

patch.description: Partially updates an energy cost record (e.g., adjusting costs or budget status). Financial Analyst and System Administrator can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes an energy cost record. Only System Administrator can delete.

200.description: Array of energy cost records for the period returned.

patch.description: Partially updates an invoice (e.g., changing status to approved, setting approved_by_id). Financial Analyst and System Administrator can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes an invoice. Only System Administrator can delete.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

get.description: Retrieves all activity log entries for system-wide audit tracking. Only the System Administrator can view the complete audit trail. Send a GET request with no additional parameters.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

200.description: Array of all activity log entries returned.

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

get.description: Retrieves a single activity log entry by its UUID including user_id, action_type, title, and timestamp. Only the System Administrator can look up specific log entries. Pass the activity_log_id as a URL path parameter.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

404.description: Activity log with the given ID not found.

put.description: Completely replaces an existing activity log entry with new data. Only the System Administrator can perform full log replacements. Send a PUT request with the activity_log_id in the URL and a complete PutActivityLogDto JSON body.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

404.description: Activity log with the given ID not found.

patch.description: Partially updates specific fields of an existing activity log entry. Only the System Administrator can modify log entries. Send a PATCH request with the activity_log_id in the URL and an UpdateActivityLogDto JSON body containing only the fields to change.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

404.description: Activity log with the given ID not found.

delete.description: Permanently removes an activity log entry from the system. Only the System Administrator can delete audit trail records. Pass the activity_log_id as a URL path parameter.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: User role for RBAC. Enum: System Administrator | Financial Analyst | Technician | Sustainability Officer | Campus Visitor

403.description: Forbidden – caller role is not System Administrator.

404.description: Activity log with the given ID not found.

post.description: Archives a new sustainability report with KPI metrics. Sustainability Officer and System Administrator can create.

get.description: Retrieves all archived sustainability reports. Sustainability Officer and System Administrator can view.
Retrieves a single report by UUID. Sustainability Officer and System Administrator can look up.

put.description: Completely replaces a report. Only System Administrator can perform full replacements.

patch.description: Partially updates a report. Sustainability Officer and System Administrator can update.

delete.description: Permanently removes a report. Only System Administrator can delete.
